title: aralia elata f. rotundata
intro: Aralia elata f. rotundata is a variety of the Aralia plant, also known as Japanese angelica tree or Japanese angelica, which is a flowering plant native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Aralia elata f. rotundata has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, and is also believed to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects that can help to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be consumed as a raw or cooked vegetable.
